candidate_llm_application: LLM frequency-domain detuning: model's spectral activations have inharmonic partials; targeted tuning removes topological defects to achieve task-consistent representations.

results.title: Frequency-Domain Interpretability / Spectral Pruning: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on frequency-domain interpretability / spectral pruning, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
results.judge_justification: Both candidate and result operate on the same LLM artefact (frequency-domain interpretability / spectral pruning); functional outcome matches even though vocabulary differs (carillon-music terms vs LLM terms).
